Dashboard Archive: 2026-07-08 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Short-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns (1d to 1y), SMA gate (above 30/50/100/200 day), ratio consistency across timeframes, and resilience on bad SPY days. Higher composite scores indicate stronger, more consistent short-term momentum.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: Momentum-Ranker Data Today's data reveals two exceptional performers dominating the momentum rankings. ATEX claims the top spot with a composite score of 96.5, driven by stellar consistency across timeframes—particularly its 57.44% one-month return and 363.63% six-month return while maintaining all four SMA gates above key moving averages. ALMS ranks close behind with even more extreme long-term gains (798.49% over one year), though its ratio consistency is slightly weaker with only 4 out of 5 ratio passes, and notably a concerning 0.59 ratio between three-month (33.3%) and one-month (56.03%) returns that suggests recent deceleration. Both tickers show strong resilience during market downturns with bad-spy-scores near 1.0-2.0, and both massively outperform SPY and QQQ across all measured timeframes. The data suggests a narrow group of high-conviction momentum names currently driving the top ranks, with ATEX appearing slightly more balanced in its growth trajectory compared to ALMS's more volatile multi-year ascent.
For educational and informational purposes only. Not financial advice. Past performance does not guarantee future results.
